message:
test(core): add property-based tests for validation matrix (ft-2p9cb.6.4.3)

13 proptests: ScenarioCategory/Verdict serde, add_scenario/record_result
increments, pass/flaky rate bounds, snapshot counts sum, reset clears,
gate pass/fail with required, MatrixSnapshot/Degradation serde,
missing_required tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
